TRR_API_URL.description: Canonical backend base URL consumed by TRR-APP and workspace-managed local tooling.

TRR_DB_DIRECT_URL.description: Explicit local direct Postgres connection string preferred by make dev before session-pooler lanes.

TRR_DB_SESSION_URL.description: Preferred explicit runtime Postgres session-mode URL for Supavisor/local-compatible workloads.

TRR_DB_URL.description: Compatibility runtime Postgres connection string for TRR-compatible reads and writes when TRR_DB_SESSION_URL is not set.

TRR_DB_TRANSACTION_URL.description: Optional transaction-mode Supavisor URL used only during documented flight tests.

TRR_DB_RUNTIME_LANE.description: Runtime DB lane selector. Defaults to session; transaction requires TRR_DB_TRANSACTION_FLIGHT_TEST=1.

TRR_DB_TRANSACTION_FLIGHT_TEST.description: Explicit opt-in guard for transaction-mode DB lane testing.

TRR_DB_FALLBACK_URL.description: Only intentional runtime fallback for the TRR Postgres lane.

TRR_INTERNAL_ADMIN_SHARED_SECRET.description: Shared internal-admin JWT signing secret across backend, app, and Screenalytics.

SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET.description: JWT signing secret required by backend auth validation for deployed runtimes.
